calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Anderson for and with Mary Goldstein (Executor).

Ms. Anderson explained that distribution was made without a Court order to save in taxes. The Petition for Final Distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Reporter: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-15-2014 Continued To Jan-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Andersson for Mary Goldstein.

Ms. Andersson stated that she filed the Petition for Final Distribution this morning with a hearing date of January 15, 2014. The status hearing was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jun-25-2013 Continued To Oct-08-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Andersson for Mary Goldstein.

Ms. Andersson stated that the Estate tax issues are still going on and requested a 90-day continuance. Status of filing of the Petition for Final Account or Petition for Approval of Status Report was continued to October 8, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Apr-09-2013 Continued To Jun-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Andersson for Executor.

Ms. Andersson stated that they are almost in a position to close the estate, but that they have an issue with the Estate tax returns that they are dealing with. Status on filing of a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Status Report was continued to June 25, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
